articles.title: Private banks to see a higher rise in NPAs than public peers in FY27
articles.description: Private banks anticipate a faster rise in bad loans by FY27 compared to public sector banks. This trend is driven by increased exposure to unsecured retail and MSME loans. Stress is growing in these segments, impacting the rural economy. The West Asia conflict adds uncertainty, with potential job losses in the IT sector being monitored for personal loan performance.

articles.title: Mohali: Consumer panel orders real estate firm to refund ₹46.65 lakh to couple in project delay case
articles.description: According to the order dated April 10, 2026, the complainant Satish Kumar Chugh and his wife Neelima Chugh, had invested in a commercial space in a project located at Aerocity, Mohali

articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections Voting Live Updates: 5.67 crore voters to decide fate of Stalin, EPS, OPS, Vijay; what’s happening
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections 2026 Voting Live: Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections 2026 voting is taking place today, April 23, with polling scheduled from 7:00 am to 6:00 pm across all 234 constituencies. Over 5.67 crore voters are eligible to cast their vote in a crucial election that will decide the next government in the state. The Election Commission of India is conducting the election in a single phase, with counting of votes set for May 4, 2026.

articles.title: MIDC fast-tracks ₹205-crore Turbhe, Airoli truck terminals to ease Thane-Belapur congestion
articles.description: Spread over 2,333.27 hectares, the Thane-Belapur MIDC estate is among the largest industrial belts in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region and houses more than 6,000 small, medium and large industrial units across sectors such as chemicals, petrochemicals, pharmaceuticals, engineering, cold storage and information technology

articles.title: Trent's speedy expansion may be taking a toll on its fashion biz
articles.description: Trent's revenue grew well, but its fashion business saw slower sales in newer cities. The company plans to raise funds for expansion. Online sales growth also moderated. Operating margins have improved significantly. Trent's stock has risen, with future performance depending on expansion execution.

articles.title: Daily Voice: Why this CIO is staying bullish on India despite the West Asia fallout
articles.description: Shailendra Kumar of Narnolia Financial Services remains constructive on the banking and auto sectors and continue to maintain an overweight stance. However, his current contrarian preference is the pharma sector.

articles.title: LinkedIn Appoints Daniel Shapero As New CEO, Replacing Ryan Roslansky
articles.description: LinkedIn names Daniel Shapero as CEO, succeeding Ryan Roslansky, aims to expand professional networking, recruitment, digital learning and AI driven features under Microsoft.

articles.title: SBI Life Q4 profit declines 1% amidst margin pressure
articles.description: SBI Life Insurance saw a slight 1% dip in fourth-quarter profit, despite healthy premium growth. Higher expenses and margin pressures contributed to the decline, with net profit falling to ₹805 crore. While net premium income rose 16%, annualised premium equivalent growth missed expectations.

articles.title: Tesla boosts spending plan to $25 billion in AI, robotics push
articles.description: Capital expenditures this year will exceed $25 billion, the company revealed Wednesday, roughly three times last year’s outlay. The planned investment is up from a prior forecast of around $20 billion.

articles.title: Tesla stock surges 5% after Q1 earnings beat, but weak sales and rising competition raise concerns
articles.description: Tesla stock went up after strong earnings in Q1 2026. The company made better profit than expected, which helped boost investor confidence. But sales growth is still slow and competition is rising. Tesla is also planning big spending on AI and robotaxis. These factors make investors both hopeful and worried about Tesla stock’s future performance and growth.

articles.title: Textile, apparel exports decline in FY26
articles.description: Textile and apparel exports declined 2.21% in FY26, despite growth in ready-made garments and key international markets.

articles.title: US stocks rally to records, but Brent oil also tops US$100 on worries about the Iran war
articles.description: US stocks hit record highs after strong earnings, but oil prices rose over the Iran war, despite US President Donald Trump extending the ceasefire.

articles.title: 'Living paycheck to paycheck in the USA': Indian student questions the dream after brutal job hunt
articles.description: An Indian student's difficult job search in the US after completing a master's degree is raising questions about the 'American dream'. Facing financial stress and visa uncertainty, the student is considering returning to India for stability. This situation highlights the challenges many Indian students encounter in the current US job market, prompting a broader discussion on career paths and aspirations.

articles.title: Cumulative seizures of potential poll inducements in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu touches Rs 1,072 crore
articles.description: Of the total 127.7-crore cash seizures, over 100 crore crore were in Tamil Nadu and Rs 27.5 crore in West Bengal. Around 39.3 lakh litres of liquor valued at Rs 102.5 crore was seized in West Bengal, as against 1.2 lakh litres worth Rs 3.8 crore in Tamil Nadu. The value of seizewd freebies was higher in Tamil Nadu at Rs 259 crore, as against Rs 178.8 crore in West Bengal.

articles.title: April 23, 2026, Birthday Forecast: Discover what the next 12 months hold for you
articles.description: This personal year, influenced by Number 8, brings a period of reassessment and growth in career and finance, encouraging patience and stepping out of comfort zones. Relationships will experience a shift towards clarity and honesty, while health requires attention to subtle signs and a focus on balance. Travel plans may face initial delays but offer valuable insights.

articles.title: Rs 86,816 crore Dubai Metro Gold Line project approved: 42 km underground network to be ready by 2032
articles.description: Dubai Metro Gold Line project approved: The new metro line will span 42 km and feature 18 stations, marking Dubai's first fully underground metro corridor.

articles.title: Patna-Bettiah expressway work gains pace, land acquisition in final stage
articles.description: Exciting developments are underway on the Patna-Bettiah four-lane expressway, with initial phases reaching 15% completion. Stretching over 163.68km and backed by an investment of Rs5996 crore, this project is poised to reduce travel time between Patna and Bettiah to just two and a half hours by 2027.

articles.title: $1 million home or $1 million in 401(k)? The retirement choice that could change your future
articles.description: $1 million home vs 401(k) retirement strategy: Housing prices have jumped nearly 55% since 2020, and that single number is reshaping the $1 million home vs 401(k) retirement strategy debate fast. Retirees are now choosing between home equity vs retirement savings, and the stakes are high. A 401(k) delivers steady income, liquidity, and market-linked growth. A $1 million home offers security but limited cash access. Rising healthcare costs, inflation, and property taxes are shifting priorities.

articles.title: India can sustain growth despite crude at $90-100 per barrel: Assocham
articles.description: India can sustain economic growth despite crude prices in the $90-100 per barrel range, supported by strong consumption, infrastructure spending and macroeconomic resilience

articles.title: US stocks: FICO shares slide as Freddie Mac, Fannie Mae begin accepting rival VantageScore
articles.description: FICO shares dropped 13% after Freddie Mac and Fannie Mae announced they will accept mortgages scored by rival VantageScore 4.0. This move aims to reduce homebuyer costs and increase competition in the credit scoring market. The housing giants will begin with a limited rollout to approved lenders.

articles.title: Banking reform ahead? Centre likely to revisit 26% voting rights cap for private shareholders
articles.description: The Indian government is likely to set up a high-level committee to review the 26% voting rights cap on private shareholders in banks under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.

articles.title: 8th Pay Commission memorandum deadline: NC-JCM highlights website glitches faced by employee unions, seeks extension of submission date
articles.description: Central government employee bodies, including NC-JCM and AIDEF, are facing technical issues while submitting memorandums for the 8th Pay Commission, prompting requests for a deadline extension to May 31, 2026. The 8th Pay Commission, however, is currently sticking to its April 30 deadline, despite reported website glitches.

articles.title: US Stocks: Blockchain billionaire Sun takes Trump family’s crypto firm to court
articles.description: Crypto entrepreneur Justin Sun on Tuesday sued World Liberty Financial, the digital currency venture co-founded by U.S. President Donald Trump and his sons, alleging that World Liberty illegally froze his holdings of tokens issued by the company.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra declares Rs 36/share final dividend; sets July 3 as record date
articles.description: Tech Mahindra's board has proposed a final dividend of Rs 36 per share for FY26, bringing the total payout to Rs 51. This comes as the IT giant reported a strong March quarter with net profit up 16% year-on-year. Shareholders will vote on the dividend at the upcoming AGM, with July 3 set as the record date.

articles.description: Recurring payments up to ₹15,000 will no longer require OTP every time.

articles.description: Karnataka sees a fourfold increase in post-pandemic tourism, surpassing 30 crore visitors, bolstered by the Shakti scheme.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 16% YoY to Rs 1,354 crore, revenue up 13%; co declares Rs 36/share dividend
articles.description: Tech Mahindra Q4 Results: Tech Mahindra reported a 16% year-on-year increase in net profit to Rs 1,354 crore for the March quarter, with revenue rising 13% to Rs 15,076 crore. The company is accelerating its AI-led transition, achieving its highest deal wins in recent years and declaring a record total dividend of Rs 51 per share for FY26.
